nasb.text: “At this point the revelation ended. As for me, Daniel, my thoughts were greatly alarming me and my face grew pale, but I kept the matter to myself.”

esv.text: “Here is the end of the matter. As for me, Daniel, my thoughts greatly alarmed me, and my color changed, but I kept the matter in my heart.”

cnv.text: 這事到此完畢。我但以理心中十分驚惶，臉色也變了，但我把這事存放在心裡。”

ccb.text: “这就是我的梦。我但以理心中十分害怕，脸色苍白，但我没有把这事告诉别人。”
